product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) and I must say, it looks like a fantastic product. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I'm interested in purchasing the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). What price can you offer me for it?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I have a maximum budget of $1440 for this purchase.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but unfortunately, it exceeds my budget. I won't be able to proceed with the purchase at that price. Thank you for your time.
